name: Forum
author: Studio CMS
description: Full community forum for Struxa CMS: categories, forums, threads and replies with Markdown, likes, subscriptions, tags, search and member profiles. Includes sticky and locked threads, online-now stats, rate limiting, reporting, and an admin moderation panel. Threads sync to a CMS content type for SEO metadata, slugs and featured images. Ships with a homepage latest-discussions widget.
